name: bootcamp-app
description: Claude Code plugin for the TestDevLab bootcamp bug tracker and test management app. Provides slash commands for test and bug workflows, skills for test generation and QA review, subagents for delegated test writing and review, and hooks that enforce project conventions on every file write.
author: Katerina Zaprova <katerina.zaprova@testdevlab.com>

commands.name: new-test
commands.description: Scaffold a new test case for a given feature or component and add it to the appropriate test suite.

commands.name: bug-report
commands.description: Create a structured bug report entry with title, description, severity, and reproduction steps.

skills.name: test-generator
skills.description: Generates test cases from a feature description or existing code. Covers happy path, edge cases, and failure modes.

skills.name: qa-review
skills.description: Reviews a feature, change, or file from a QA perspective — identifies missing coverage, edge cases, and potential regressions.

agents.name: test-writer
agents.description: Subagent that writes test case files. Dispatches automatically on requests to write or generate tests for a feature or flow.

agents.name: qa-reviewer
agents.description: Subagent that performs QA review of code changes. Dispatches automatically on requests to review a feature from a testing perspective.

hooks.name: check-response-shape
hooks.description: Warns when a file under server/routes/ uses a res.json() call that is missing the required {success, data, error} envelope defined in CLAUDE.md.

hooks.name: check-severity-enum
hooks.description: Warns when a JS/TS/JSX/TSX file contains a quoted severity word outside the project enum (Critical | Major | Minor | Trivial). Catches stray values like 'high', 'medium', 'low', 'blocker', 'cosmetic'.

hooks.name: session-summary
hooks.description: Prints a session summary to the terminal when Claude Code exits: current date/time and a list of every file written or edited during the session.
